Arquia Business Intelligence

Unified Shopify, Google Analytics and third-party app data into a single executive dashboard. An AI agent populates KPIs every Monday and emails stakeholders a structured brief with highlights, lowlights and actions. Fully automated.

ITAV — Travel App

At Amazon 2023 to 2026

Alexa+ Prompting & Agentic Systems

Designed and shipped the horizontal prompting and self-reflection systems powering Alexa+. These systems enable multi-turn conversations, agentic task completion (food ordering via Grubhub and Uber Eats, restaurant bookings via OpenTable) and inferential commands across 600M+ devices. Reduced compute costs 68% and lifted response accuracy above 95%.

LLM systemsPrompt engineeringAgentic AIPython

Case studies

Where I have had
measurable impact

Amazon · Alexa
Dec 2021 – May 2026 · 4.5 years
Sr. Technical Product Leader, AI Platform

Rebuilding the AI core of 600M+ devices

Orchestrated the global AI platform strategy for Alexa, aligning 80+ domain teams on a unified technical roadmap. Led a team of PMs responsible for developer experience. Designed two horizontal systems — a prompting layer and a self-reflection engine — that became foundational infrastructure powering Alexa+.

Key decisionBuilt horizontal reusable systems rather than per-team solutions. Higher upfront cost but eliminated duplicated work across 80+ teams and became the foundation for every Alexa+ feature shipped after 2024.
68%

Explore Alexa+
Arquia · shoparquia.com
Feb 2026 – May 2026
Chief Product & Growth Officer

Building a full-stack growth engine from scratch

Took full product and growth ownership of a premium e-commerce brand. Re-architected the Shopify infrastructure with Claude Code, built autonomous AI agents for inventory and reporting, redesigned the conversion funnel end-to-end and launched lifecycle email and SMS programmes. Achieved 4x YoY revenue growth in Q1.

Key decisionBuilt the AI reporting infrastructure before optimising the funnel. Without clean data there was no reliable signal. The agents gave visibility first — every growth decision after was evidence-based.

ADP · DataCloud
Dec 2019 – Dec 2021 · 2 years
Lead Product Manager, Data & AI Platform

Scaling a global AI data platform to 1.1M clients

Led product strategy for DataCloud — ADP's AI and analytics platform serving 80%+ of Fortune 500 companies and 1 in 6 US employees. Managed a team of 3 PMs. Drove global expansion across 30+ countries, launched AI-powered benchmarking products and restructured the release cadence to achieve 3x faster delivery.

Key decisionPrioritised global expansion over feature depth in year one. Counterintuitive at the time — existing customers wanted more features — but getting DataCloud into 30+ markets first created the compounding revenue effect that funded everything that followed.

About

Builder. Strategist. Human.

Product and technology leader who moves between executive strategy and hands-on building without losing a step.

Built AI platforms at Amazon powering billions of weekly interactions and led PM teams responsible for developer experience and platform growth. Shipped autonomous agents as a solo operator. Led global teams across New York and Barcelona.

Trained as an engineer (Industrial and Energy Engineering, Universidad de Sevilla and TU Berlin), sharpened at ESADE Business School, and tested across Amazon, ADP, Airbus and a travel-tech startup I founded.

Pursuing VP / Director Product roles where AI depth and product judgment both matter.
